meta.title: Post-training TRM & A Retrospective on ARC Prize 2025
meta.description:
Covering a) Winners, b) Trelis TRM fine-tuning approach, c) My experience competing for the prize.

Thanks to Runpod for compute sponsorship, affiliate sign-up link: https://runpod.io?ref=jmfkcdio
